notes:
On proton 3.16-4 and previous versions I had network connection error. This error gone in proton 3.16-6 but the game stops at black screen while loading.
When I returned to proton 3.16-4 all worked out fine except minor fps issues.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: Conitues to load into a black screen with -7, can't skip past into game.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: Slow downs in solitary sands, but runs mostly perfectly. Shading error when trying to view inventory/equipment after leaving your home. Can be fixed with "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%", but this will slow down the game even more.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes:
What works: Primary game out of the box, all DLC. Everything seemed to play great.
What doesn't work: Online play (EAC fails to start).
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: Game works perfectly fine on 3.16-4, however with 3.16-8, as with -6 and -7, the game gets stuck on a black screen when launched, making it unplayable.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: With Proton 4.2-1, the game launches perfectly fine once again, as it did on 3.16-4. All singleplayer content works well and runs fine, but I have to rating it at Silver due to EAC preventing online play.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: This game works normal now. Before I was having some serious frame rate issues, making the game unplayable. After a couple of system updates and the latest version of proton (Beta 3.16-8) it runs like it should. I have not tried multiplayer though.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: SP works great out of the box. Haven't tried multiplayer though, but since it uses EAC i don't expect it works.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: Game runs really smooth, some minor stuttering and framedrops, but i think that is because i have to run it on borderless/window mode because fullscreen would cap my fps at 30. Not a higher score because of what i mentioned above.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: Character creation is borked. You need to downgrade to proton 4.2-9, create your character and then switch back if you want it to work with proton 4.11-2.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet

notes: Character creation works fine now. There is an issue where alt tab can cause problems for the camera, but alt-tabbing does not really have to do with the game itself, so I am giving this a platinum rating for everything else being perfect.
title: Sword Art Online: Fatal Bullet
